Planning artifact for REMED-017: Reorder isGodotFatalDiagnosticOutput() before isClassNameReloadParseWarning() in classifyCommandFailure() so fatal script-load diagnostics with exit_code===0 are classified as syntax_error (blocking) instead of tooling_parse_warning (non-blocking), preventing false PASS smoke artifacts when Godot reports "Failed to load script" alongside class_name RELOAD parse errors.
